# dropdownlogistics.com
# AI Context Manifest · llms.txt v1.0
# Last updated: 2026-03-02
# For the styled version, visit: /ai

## IDENTITY

site: dropdownlogistics.com
name: Dropdown Logistics (DDL)
operator: Dave Kitchens (D.K. Hale)
credentials: CPA · 10+ years internal audit
role: Senior Staff Auditor → Commission Analyst II · UMB Bank
methodology: Chaos → Structured → Automated
design_system: CottageHumble ("Humble surface. Cathedral underneath.")
stack: Next.js 14 · Vercel · Static HTML iframes · React components
status: Active development · 110+ routes · 44 systems · 65 standards

## METHODOLOGY

DDL (Dropdown Logistics) is a governance-grade systems methodology built by one operator.
Core loop: Chaos → Structured → Automated
Architecture: Dimensional modeling — facts, dimensions, measures, time. Star schema.
The architecture does not change between domains. The data does.
Governance: Standards (how to build), Systems (what's built), Registry (where it lives), Council (who reviews it).
Council: Nine AI models review work products using constrained LOCK/REVISE/REJECT verdicts.
Models: Claude, GPT-4, Gemini, DeepSeek, Grok, Meta AI, Copilot, Mistral, Perplexity.

## WINGS

The site is organized into five wings — identity-level groupings with distinct color accents.

wing: DDL
  full_name: Dropdown Logistics
  color: #B23531 (crimson)
  home: /ddl
  scope: Governance, framework, methodology, council, memoir, projects
  nav: Has dropdown groups (Governance, Framework, Memoir & Story, Work)

wing: D&A
  full_name: Data & Analytics
  color: #C49A3C (amber)
  home: /blindspot
  scope: BlindSpot modules, analytics dashboards, annual recaps
  nav: Has dropdown groups (BlindSpot, Analytics, Recaps)

wing: DexVerse
  full_name: The Lore Layer
  color: #8a6cc9 (violet)
  home: /dexlore
  scope: Origin stories, companions, era timeline, glossary
  nav: Has dropdown groups (Lore, Reference)

wing: Dossiers
  full_name: CottageHumble RPG
  color: #4A9E6B (green)
  home: /dossiers
  scope: Character dossiers across D&D 5e, Divinity OS2, Skyrim
  nav: Accent-only (no dropdown, landing page handles internal nav)

wing: Products
  full_name: Behavioral Intelligence
  color: #6B9DC2 (blue)
  home: /products/behavioral-intelligence
  scope: AI-native behavioral analytics concept suite
  nav: Accent-only (no dropdown, landing page handles internal nav)

## DESIGN SYSTEM — COTTAGEHUMBLE

colors:
  navy: #0D1B2A (background)
  card: #10202f (card surfaces)
  cream: #F5F1EB (primary text)
  cream-mid: rgba(245,241,235,0.55) (secondary text)
  cream-dim: rgba(245,241,235,0.3) (tertiary text)
  cream-ghost: rgba(245,241,235,0.08) (ghost backgrounds, hover states)
  border: rgba(245,241,235,0.06) (borders)
  crimson: #B23531 (DDL wing)
  amber: #C49A3C (D&A wing)
  violet: #8a6cc9 (DexVerse wing)
  green: #4A9E6B (Dossiers wing)
  blue: #6B9DC2 (Products wing)

typography:
  display: Space Grotesk (headings, wing names, UI labels)
  mono: JetBrains Mono (data, stats, metadata, navigation)
  body: Source Serif 4 (prose, descriptions, long-form content)

principles:
  - Dark navy base, cream text, wing-specific accent colors
  - Never use white backgrounds, generic grays, or off-palette colors
  - Cards: background #10202f, border rgba(245,241,235,0.06), border-radius 7-8px
  - Wing accent patterns: {color}12 for bg, {color}40 for borders, {color}80 for dimmed text
  - Footer gradient: crimson → amber → blue → violet → green

## CONTENT TYPES

landing: Hub page with internal navigation to subpages. Linked in nav.
page: Standalone content page. Not individually linked in nav.
module: BlindSpot analytics module. Self-contained domain-specific dashboard.
dashboard: Analytics dashboard outside BlindSpot. Standalone data visualization.
dossier: Character profile with stat block, narrative bio, campaign data.
registry: Party composition document tracking group membership and roles.
chronicle: Multi-generation or multi-session narrative tracking document.
tool: Functional utility (style governance, prompt system, etc.).
product: Concept suite or shipped product.
dynamic: Route with [slug] parameter, generated from content.

## ROUTE INVENTORY

# DDL Wing (crimson)
/ddl                              landing    DDL wing home
/council                          landing    Nine-model AI governance council
/council/profiles                 landing    Individual model profiles
/council/profiles/[model]         dynamic    Per-model profile pages
/council/documents                index      Council review documents
/council/auto-council             page       AutoCouncil orchestration system
/council/scaling                  page       Council scaling methodology
/council/faq                      page       Council FAQ
/standards                        landing    65 published standards
/systems                          landing    44 governed systems
/registry                         page       Canonical index of all DDL assets
/excelligence                     page       Knowledge graph explorer
/methodology                      landing    How DDL builds things
/methodology/palette              page       Template Palette — 6 molds, 11 primitives
/methodology/palette/narrative    page       Seeds to synthesis narrative
/mindframe                        landing    Persona calibration system
/dexos                            landing    Multi-model coordination framework
/framework/pss                    page       Prompt Strategy System
/framework/vibe-coding            page       Vibe coding methodology
/guides/llm                       page       LLM guide
/memoir                           landing    "Little to Know Experience" — weekly memoir, 20 chapters
/memoir/calendar                  page       Release calendar
/forewords                        page       Nine AI models, nine forewords
/about                            page       The operator
/projects                         landing    Client project showcases
/prioritease                      page       PrioritEase task governance tool
/work/rexcel                      page       r/Excel community contributions

/blindspot/campaign               module     D&D campaign intelligence dashboard

/blindspot/betting                module     Original BlindSpot — fake-money sports analytics
/blindspot/backtest               module     Historical strategy validation
/blindspot/llm                    module     Local LLM setup guide
/analytics                        landing    Standalone analytics dashboards
/analytics/grammarly              dashboard  4.57M words analyzed
/analytics/sonic-thread           dashboard  Audio pattern analytics
/analytics/callback-engine        dashboard  Pattern detection engine
/analytics/catnip-map             dashboard  Behavioral analytics
/analytics/dexdash                dashboard  DexVerse metrics dashboard
/analytics/tone                   dashboard  Tone analysis
/analytics/memoir                 dashboard  Memoir analytics
/recaps                           landing    Annual signal reports
/recaps/apple-music               page       2025 Apple Music deep dive
/recaps/annual-signal             page       Annual signal report
/recaps/predictions               page       AI prediction accuracy audit

/dexlore/council                  page       15 named AI companions
/other-works                      page       Product and project showcase
/knowledge/map                    page       Knowledge map
/knowledge/glossary               page       12 canon terms defined

/dossiers/merrick                 dossier    Elf Mage · Divinity OS2
/dossiers/riflen                  dossier    Fighter · Divinity OS2
/dossiers/doc-rickets             dossier    Undead Rogue · Divinity OS2
/dossiers/xuth-jr                 dossier    Argonian L56 · Skyrim
/dossiers/xuth-iii                dossier    Argonian reboot · Skyrim
/dossiers/xuth-sr                 dossier    Daedric ancestor · Skyrim
/dossiers/ash-snow-steel          registry   D&D party registry
/dossiers/fort-joy                registry   Divinity party registry
/dossiers/leafshadow-lineage      chronicle  Three-generation Skyrim chronicle
/dossiers/hal-style-lock          tool       Portrait governance system
/dossiers/campaign-analytics      dashboard  BlindSpot RPG analytics

# Products Wing (blue)
/products/behavioral-intelligence product    Behavioral Intelligence concept suite

# Meta
/ai                               page       AI context document (styled)

## NAVIGATION MODEL

- Five wing tabs in top nav: DDL, D&A, DexVerse, Dossiers, Products
- Three wings have contextual dropdown groups; two are accent-only
- Wing detection is path-based (routeWingMap in SiteNav.tsx)
- Nav links go to landing pages; landing pages handle internal nav
- Breadcrumb: subpages show "← Parent" link below nav bar
- Root "/" hides nav entirely; landing page component handles layout

## TECHNICAL CONTEXT

framework: Next.js 14 (App Router)
deployment: Vercel (git push → auto-deploy, branch promotion via dashboard)
rendering: Mix of React components and static HTML via iframe from /public/preview/
routing: File-based via /app/ directory
state: Minimal — mostly static. No database. No auth. No CMS.
dev_path: C:\Users\dkitc\OneDrive\ddl-site\
shell: PowerShell with starter script (ddl-start.ps1)
variables: $site (project root), $dl (Downloads), $ddl (iCloud DDL archive)

## RULES FOR AI COLLABORATORS

1. Always use CottageHumble tokens. Navy backgrounds, cream text, wing-specific accents.
2. Never use white backgrounds, generic grays, or colors outside the palette.
3. Respect the wing model. Every page belongs to a wing. New routes need routeWingMap updates.
4. HTML files go in /public/preview/. React components go in /components/.
5. Landing pages handle their own nav. Don't add subpage routes to the top nav.
6. PowerShell Set-Content needs -Encoding UTF8 flag. Default is UTF-16 which breaks Next.js.
7. After nav changes, verify all five wings: /ddl, /blindspot, /dexlore, /dossiers, /products/behavioral-intelligence.
8. Private routes exist but are intentionally unlisted. Don't enumerate them.
9. The operator values coherent velocity — complete, auditable systems built at speed.
10. When in doubt, follow the pattern. The architecture repeats. The data changes.

## EOF
# Dropdown Logistics · Cottage — Humble surface. Cathedral underneath.
# same engine · different data · if it generates data, DDL builds the system
